product_name: Fra-Ber Lava Interni B Aroma Enzimli Genel Amaçlı Detaylı Araç Temizleyici (1:40 Konsantre) - 5 kg

sources.page_title: Lava Interni B Aroma Evoenzymes by Fra-Ber
sources.cleaned_content:
Lava Interni B Aroma

Intensive detergent for fabrics patented** with enzymes

Lava Interni B Aroma from Evoenzymes line is an innovative scented product to clean your car's fabric surfaces: it combines the cleaning action of the traditional "Lava Interni B" with the exclusive enzyme-based technology that compacts fibres and eliminates organic odors. It removes all residues from the fabrics, with a quick self-drying effect.

The main features:

- Patented** formula with added enzymes to improve the quality of car cleaning.
- It cleans fabrics thoroughly and immediately.
- Longer-lasting cleaning thanks to the removal of organic residue.
- Drastic odour control, thanks to the complete biodegradation of organic dirt molecules.
- A wonderful scent of fresh clean will amaze your customers.
- No NTA/PHOSPHOROUS/POTASSIUM HYDROXIDE added*.
- Contains surfactants that meet the biodegradability criteria according to Regulation (EC) 648/2004.

* May contain traces.
** Patent no. MI2013A000782.

Product Image: https://www.fra-ber.it/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/lava-interni-b-aroma-evoenzymes-di-fra-ber-819x1024.jpg

Directions for use

Spray system: 1:25-1:50

Pre-dilution: The product can be pre-diluted. Storage method and water quality may influence the shelf life of the pre-diluted solution.

Warnings

When handling the product, observe the advice given in the MSDS and data sheets, the manufacturer's warnings on the devices and materials involved and, if necessary, check for tolerability. Keep container closed and only use plugs with tube passages. The raw materials used may lead to changes in colour and turbidity, without this leading to a drop in performance and/or quality. In the case of high water temperature (> 40°C) and/or water hardness (> 4.5 mmo/L ≈ 25° dH), limescale formation can be prevented by adding "Ca Clean".

Characteristics: NO PHOSPHOROUS / NTA / KOH

Certifications: VDA Klasse A-5, VDA Klasse B-10

Formats and article codes:
- Product ID: EIN1
- Format: 5 kg - Item Code: 75614
- Format: 25 kg - Item Code: 75404

Download:

- Technical data sheet (English): https://fraberantegnate-my.sharepoint.com/:b:/g/personal/onedrive_fra-ber_it/ETB1sqbTEsBLv7W319vyp7oB0cQGWuUiHvDDQVBtk64Gjg?e=I91DGr

sources.page_title: FRA-BER LAVA INTERNI B AROMA 5L Intensive Detergent For Fabrics | Garage Equipment Center | GEC Egypt
sources.cleaned_content:
FRA-BER LAVA INTERNI B AROMA 5L Intensive Detergent For Fabrics

Product Image: https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.product/5303/image_1024/%5BCCCCXX00008%5D%20FRA-BER%20LAVA%20INTERNI%20B%20AROMA%205L%20Intensive%20Detergent%20For%20Fabrics?unique=cc4c87f

Description:

LAVA INTERNI B AROMA is an advanced, intensive detergent designed to deep-clean fabric and textile surfaces in vehicles. Powered by enzyme-based technology, it doesn't just clean - it compacts fabric fibers, removes organic dirt, and neutralizes unpleasant odors at the source. The result? Fabrics that are cleaner, fresher, and dry faster. Whether used in detailing centers or for personal car care, this detergent leaves behind a lasting fresh aroma that enhances the customer experience.

Key Features:

- Deep and immediate cleaning of automotive fabrics
- Enzyme-powered formula breaks down organic residues
- Long-lasting cleanliness and odor elimination
- Quick-drying effect to speed up service times
- Fresh, clean scent that impresses customers
- Ideal for seats, carpets, door panels, and more

Dilution:
- Sprayer use: 1:25 - 1:50
- Storage tip: Store above 5°C. Do not mix with algaecides or bactericides.

Price: 1,100.00 EGP

Categories: Interior Chemicals, Multi-Purpose Cleaners

Internal Reference: CCCCXX00008

Specifications:
- Category: Interior Chemicals
- Sub-category: Multi-Purpose Cleaners

Fra-Ber Lava Interni B Aroma ( Fabric Cleaner )

Description:

INTENSIVE DETERGENT FOR FABRICS.

EvoEnzymes Aroma b Interiors Cleaner is an innovative scented product to clean your car's fabric surfaces: it combines the cleaning action of the traditional Interiors Cleaner B with the exclusive enzyme-based technology that compacts fibres and eliminates odours. It removes all residues from the fabrics, with a quick drying effect.

It cleans fabrics thoroughly and immediately.

- Longer-lasting cleaning thanks to the removal of organic residue.
- Drastic odour control, thanks to the complete biodegradation of organic dirt molecules.

A wonderful fresh, clean fragrance will amaze your customers.

Additional information:
- Size: 5L, 25L
